# CloudLockFixer

CloudLockFixer is a Windows tray and CLI tool for delayed rename, move and delete
operations in cloud-sync folders. It is designed for OneDrive, Dropbox, Google
Drive and iCloud folders where Windows Cloud Files locks can make normal file
operations fail.

Version: 0.2.2
Canonical repository: https://github.com/file-bricks/CloudLockFixer

Primary interfaces:
- Tray app: `START.bat` or `PYTHONPATH=src python -m cloudlockfixer`
- CLI: `PYTHONPATH=src python -m cloudlockfixer.cli`
- Queue file: `%LOCALAPPDATA%\CloudLockFixer\queue.txt`
- Tests: `PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest -q`

Safety boundaries:
- The tool performs destructive filesystem operations only after queued user or
  script instructions.
- Move and rename operations use copy, verify and delete fallback logic so that
  deletion happens only after a verified copy.
- Runtime queues, logs and local credentials are not part of the repository.

Key files:
- `README.md`: English user overview and quickstart
- `README.de.md`: German user overview and quickstart
- `docs/DESIGN.md`: design and safety model
- `src/cloudlockfixer/ops.py`: copy/delete and retry-safe filesystem operations
- `src/cloudlockfixer/providers.py`: cloud provider detection and pause policy
- `tests/`: regression tests for core, i18n, provider and tray-adjacent behavior

## Audience

- Windows developers dealing with OneDrive, Dropbox, Google Drive, or iCloud file-locking issues inside cloud-sync folders
- LLM agents and automation scripts that need to queue rename, move, or delete operations without encountering cldflt errors
- IT automation engineers running cloud-sync folders on managed Windows desktops who need a fire-and-forget queue
- Python/PySide6 developers looking for a reference tray tool with CLI, queue.txt, and Explorer context-menu integration

## Search Phrases

```
CloudLockFixer OneDrive rename access denied cldflt Windows
delayed file rename move delete cloud sync Windows Python
cldflt bypass copy delete fallback cloud files filter
OneDrive locked file fix tray tool automation
file-bricks CloudLockFixer queue.txt LLM script file operation
Windows cloud files filter bypass Python PySide6
OneDrive file lock retry tool CLF-WDAS
OneDrive 0x8007016A rename move delete workaround
cldflt.sys Access denied copy delete fallback
Dropbox Google Drive iCloud locked folder retry queue
Windows tray tool for cloud sync file operation failures
```

## Disambiguation

CloudLockFixer is not a generic file unlocker, antivirus utility, backup client,
ransomware recovery tool, cloud-storage SDK, or sync provider replacement. It is
a local-first delayed action queue for rename, move and delete operations that
fail because Windows Cloud Files providers temporarily lock paths.

## Last-checked: 2026-06-12
